description: Extended analytics for tournaments and players: new analytics service, analytics tab in MainWindow with sub-tabs (Tournaments, Players, Comparison). Text/table-based analytics including tournament stats (avg/median/min/max points, place distribution), tournament comparison, trends, top-10 results; player progress, comparison of 2-3 players, win percentage, average position, stability (standard deviation).
steps: Create app/services/analytics.py with AnalyticsService class: methods for tournament_stats(tournament_id) returning dataclass with avg/median/min/max points and place distribution; compare_tournaments(tournament_ids) returning comparative data; player_progress(player_id) returning list of tournament results over time; compare_players(player_ids) returning comparative stats; player_stability(player_id) returning std deviation; top_results(period_start, period_end, limit=10). Use sqlite3.Connection as parameter, frozen dataclass results.

Create app/ui/analytics_view.py with AnalyticsView(QWidget) containing QTabWidget with 3 sub-tabs: TournamentAnalyticsTab, PlayerAnalyticsTab, ComparisonTab. TournamentAnalyticsTab: combo to select tournament, button to load stats, QTableWidget showing stats, section for trends (participants over time). PlayerAnalyticsTab: combo to select player, table showing progress by tournament, stats summary (win %, avg position, best/worst, stability). ComparisonTab: multi-select for tournaments or players, table showing side-by-side comparison.
Register the 'Аналитика' tab in app/ui/main_window.py after 'Тренер' tab. Add import and add to _activate_tab aliases.

Add tests in tests/test_analytics.py: test tournament_stats calculation correctness, test player_progress returns ordered results, test compare_players with 2-3 players, test stability calculation, test top_results with period filter. Use tmp_path for DB, create test data with players/tournaments/results.
Ensure mypy clean for new files.
acceptance_criteria: AnalyticsService returns correct stats for tournaments (avg, median, min, max verified with known test data)
Player progress returns tournament results in chronological order
Stability calculation matches standard deviation of player scores
ComparisonTab displays side-by-side data for multiple players/tournaments
New 'Аналитика' tab appears in MainWindow between 'Тренер' and 'Импорт/Экспорт'
All new tests pass with pytest
mypy clean on all new files
findings: All 9 analytics tests pass. Full suite now 160 passed (up from 151), 70 skipped. mypy clean. Analytics tab registered successfully between Тренер and Импорт/Экспорт.
